lib.load_paths¶

Classes

Paths(list_path, executing_mode, path_to_geom)

class lib.load_paths.Paths(list_path, executing_mode, path_to_geom)[source]¶

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • list_path (list)

  • executing_mode (str)

  • path_to_geom (str)

__init__(list_path, executing_mode, path_to_geom)[source]¶

Constructor for Paths class

This function instantiates all variables necessary for Paths class

Parameters:

  • list_path (list) – Path to an lst file with h5 file paths.

  • executing_mode (str) – Assert whether hitfinder is in training mode or inference (running) mode

  • path_to_geom (dict) – Path to geometry file for multi-panel detectors

Return type:

None

get_file_names()[source]¶

Returns list of file names put into h5 file

Return type:

list

get_vds()[source]¶

Returns vds

Return type:

str

graph_image(array, number)[source]¶

Plot an image to see what an example of the data looks like to check orientation

run_paths()[source]¶

Wrapper function for functions for loading paths

This function calls the functions that set up the files to be read and then maps the data to a virtual dataset (VDS)

Return type:

None
